title: lx-0/llm-wiki
summary: Self-cartography engine: Turn your scattered personal data into a queryable Obsidian wiki. You and your agents read from the same surface.

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Memory-first Rust AI agent for long-running work. Temporal graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model cascade routing. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF · TEE. MCP + ACP + A2A. Sub-agents. One binary.

title: siyuan-note/siyuan
summary: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: personal AI runtime, local-first. MCP bridge giving Claude Code 170+ tools (LSP, debugger, terminal, git) inside VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or JetBrains. Optional Patchwork layer adds YAML recipes, an approval queue, and an oversight dashboard. Your models, your machine, your policy. (Mac & Windows)

title: rolandtolnay/session-index
summary: Index Claude Code conversations into SQLite via hooks, with local LLM summaries and a search skill that lets Claude recall past sessions

title: mekedron/ClipSlop
summary: AI writing tool for macOS — fix grammar, translate, rewrite, format text with a hotkey. Chain prompts into pipelines. Works with ChatGPT, Anthropic, Ollama. Free and open-source.

title: Cerid-AI/quenchforge
summary: Local LLM, embedding, reranker, and Whisper inference for Mac + AMD discrete GPU. Ollama- and OpenAI-compatible HTTP APIs. Apache-2.0.

title: Tsoleou/RAGLoom
summary: Visual RAG pipeline editor for on-device product Q&A. Drag-and-drop node builder with built-in safety guardrails and output auditing. Python + FastAPI + React + Ollama.

title: intelliswarm-ai/intelli-mailbox
summary: Never miss an Email. A local AI assistant for your Gmail inbox. Summarizes long threads, ranks what's important, and drafts replies - all running on your laptop with Ollama. Nothing leaves your machine

title: zs001-agi/asi-api
summary: Wutong ASI API: self-evolving AI, 5 local models, pay-per-token. 🧬 Powered by asi-evolve & code-opt-ai

title: kristopolous/free-ollama
summary: Free Ollama: Thousands of Ollamas are waiting for you

title: tajwarchy/production-rag
summary: Production RAG system with LangChain, Qdrant & Docker. Multi-user isolation, 3 retrieval strategies (Similarity/MMR/HyDE), reranking, query rewriting, async ingestion worker.

title: sterlp/eclipse-peon-ai
